arts.ttl: Tranmere end winless run with late victory at Bromley
Bromley attacker believes late professional start will extend playing career
arts.sum: Corey Whitely believes his late start in professional football will allow him to extend his playing career with Bromley. Whitely has gone on to record close to 300 National League appearances during spells with Bromley, Ebbsfleet and Dagenham & Redbridge.

arts.ttl: Free agent snapped up by new club after Tranmere Rovers exit
arts.sum: Southport have signed Jack Bentley following his exit from Tranmere Rovers, as announced by their official club website.… The post Free agent snapped up by new club after Tranmere Rovers exit appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
